sandwich.title: Sandwich Builder
sandwich.subtitle: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet — Recipes for Shiny Hunt, Encounter & more
sandwich.reverseSearch: 🔎 Reverse Search — "I want this power, which recipe?"
sandwich.noRecipes: No recipes found with these filters 😅
sandwich.shinyInfo: All give Sparkling Power Lv.3 + Encounter Power Lv.3. Require 2x Herba Mystica of the same type.
sandwich.encounterInfo: No Herba Mystica needed. Great for EV farming and completing the Pokédex.
sandwich.noEncounter: No Encounter recipe for this type yet 🔧
sandwich.footer: PokéTrainer SV Tools — Sandwich Builder v1.0
